main.headline: Drive Your Dream Car Today

booking.title: Instant Booking
booking.description: No waiting. Confirm your car in seconds.

CTA.title: Ready to Drive?
CTA.description: Join thousands of happy drivers. Sign up today and get your first ride.

hero.subtitle: ABOUT US
hero.title: Revolutionizing Car Rental
hero.description: GoDrive is a premium car rental platform that connects drivers with exceptional vehicles from trusted owners. We make luxury accessible.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text1: We believe everyone deserves access to premium vehicles without the hassle of traditional rental companies. Our platform eliminates paperwork, long queues, and hidden fees.
mission.text2: By connecting car owners with drivers, we create a community where luxury is accessible, affordable, and enjoyable for everyone.

values.title: Our Core Values
values.subtitle: These principles guide everything we do at GoDrive

trust.title: Trust & Safety
trust.description: Every vehicle and owner is thoroughly verified for your peace of mind.

customer.title: Customer First
customer.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We are here 24/7 to support you.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Using cutting-edge technology to make car rental simple and fast.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Only premium vehicles make it to our curated collection.

why.title: Why Choose GoDrive?
why.subtitle: We are more than just a car rental platform

community.title: Community Driven
community.description: Built by drivers, for drivers. We understand what matters most when you are behind the wheel.

premium.title: Premium Quality
premium.description: Every vehicle in our collection meets strict quality standards. No compromises, only the best.

insured.title: Fully Insured
insured.description: Every rental comes with comprehensive insurance coverage. Drive with complete peace of mind.

cta.title: Ready to Experience GoDrive?
cta.description: Join thousands of satisfied drivers and discover a new way to rent premium vehicles.

header.title: Contact Us
